title: Woo X - Rekt
relevance_summary: Phishing attack leading to unauthorized withdrawals across multiple networks

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves unauthorized withdrawals from known hot wallets

summary: Woo X suffered a $14 million breach due to a phishing attack compromising a team member's device, allowing attackers to withdraw funds across multiple networks. A guard could have detected and blocked unauthorized withdrawals from known hot wallets.
